title: Luffy Calls Nami His Crewmate
description: On pages 6–9, luffy calls nami his crewmate focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.
scene: On pages 6–9, luffy calls nami his crewmate focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're my crew- mate, got it!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: He won!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: He did it, sis! He won!:)

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Gen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It feels like I'm dreaming... I'd never imagine that such a day would actually come...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong Park has fallen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shishi sigh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's enough gele- brating!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: CH! Chi Chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi ch

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's him..!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What a lucky day it is for me today!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'd like to thank you all for showing me a most exhilarating battle.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'd have never guessed that the fishmen would actually be defeated by a bunch of no- name pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whether by sheer luck or not,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But thanks to you, the money that I had to hand over to Arlong,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As well as all the riches of along park now belongs to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So throw down your arms!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I, CPT. Nezumi of the 16* branch of the marines, shall hereby take credit for your victory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ZORO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It ain't nice to be such a wet blanket,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: When people are busy celebrating.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
